overview: Bhimavaram Institute of Engineering and Technology (BIET), established in 2007 by the Swaranabharathi Educational Trust, is a private autonomous institution located in a serene 20-acre campus in Pennada, near Bhimavaram. The college is dedicated to providing value-based technical and management education to meet industry standards.
accreditation: Accredited by NAAC with an 'A' Grade. Approved by AICTE and recognized under UGC Section 2(f). It holds permanent affiliation with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada (JNTUK) and has been granted Autonomous status.

coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45-50% in PCM + AP EAPCET rank

admissions.admissionProcess: 70% of seats are filled through the Convener Quota (Category A) based on state entrance ranks (AP EAPCET/ICET). The remaining 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on merit or JEE scores. Lateral entry is available via AP ECET.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 2026; AP ICET 2026: May 2026; Counseling: June - July 2026.

facilities: Separate Hostels for Boys and Girls
campus.specialNote: The campus is eco-friendly and pollution-free. It features specialized research cells and an Institution-Industry Cell to bridge the gap between academic learning and corporate requirements.

contact.address: Swamy Jnanananda Ashram Road, Pennada, Palakoderu Mandal, West Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh - 534243
